description: PR-mined: real upstream range v1.4.0..v1.4.2 (privacy-friendly-2048), specifically the SettingsActivity super-qualifier cleanup + secusoLogoDrawable theme wiring (commit range collapsed to its net diff; version-bump-only commits in between excluded). Adds a new declare-styleable attr + wires AppTheme's colorScheme item to a NEW drawable resource (secuso_logo_black.xml, secuso_logo_white.xml -- real vendored content, not authored) while also touching a Java class (SettingsActivity's onCreate drops an unneeded super. qualifier). 'add' in editClass because two brand-new drawable resource NAMES are introduced, needing R regen. recompiledClasses upper bound is widened past SettingsActivity(+nested fragment) to 6: adding new drawable IDs shifts other R.* int constants, so any class with an inlined R reference recompiles too -- the README's documented 'R-id churn' caveat, reproduced here on real content rather than synthetic.
